summary: Add a test for rejecting SSE streaming requests with word_timestamps=true via a 4xx error, as the guard was widened from raw-audio-only to all HTTP streaming.
Update docstrings to clarify the new stream_format='audio' raw-audio streaming path and that stream=True now means SSE.
Add a docstring note that word_timestamps=true is rejected for all HTTP streaming (including SSE) and to use the WebSocket endpoint instead.
